title: Exemptions
doc_html:
§460.35.  Exemptions

The provisions of this Part shall not apply to any entity that contracts with the department to provide fiscal intermediary services in processing claims of health care providers.

Acts 2013, No. 312, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 2014.
